'''Kuhqo''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shaper caste|shaper]] who became a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]]. He joined the [[Jeedai heresy]] and used a [[genetic splicer]] to access an [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor's]] [[qahsa]], searching for planets that might be [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|the Prophet's living world]]. His search brought him and a number of other Heretics, including [[Hul Qat]], to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. There, they met with [[Tahiri Veila]], the [[Tahiri Veila|one-who-was-shaped]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}}
